Placement Success Rate

The Process

Simple. Structured.
Effective.

Purpose-built workflows for every stakeholder in the SIWES ecosystem.

🎓
Student Journey
01
Create your profile
Complete your academic profile with field, level, CGPA, and preferred placement states across Nigeria.
02
Discover smart matches
Browse verified placements ranked by relevance — scored on location, field of study, level, and CGPA.
03
Apply and track in real time
Submit applications and follow live status updates from shortlist through to placement confirmation.
🏢
Organization Journey
01
Get verified
Register your company and submit CAC and ITF compliance documents for coordinator approval.
02
Publish placements
Create SIWES openings with role details, field requirements, slot count, and stipend info.
03
Review and confirm
Evaluate candidates from your dashboard and confirm selected interns with a single action.

Capabilities

Everything
you need.

Designed for reliable SIWES placement management at every level of the ecosystem.

✦
Smart Placement Matching
Algorithmic scoring by field, level, location, and CGPA — every match is meaningful and ranked.
◈
Verified Organization Pipeline
Coordinator-led review with document verification keeps all opportunities trusted and high-quality.
⊞
Role-Based Workspaces
Purpose-built portals for students, organizations, and institutional coordinators — zero overlap.
◎
Coordinator Analytics
Track placement outcomes, org approvals, and institution-level progress in one live dashboard.
◉
Real-Time Notifications
Socket-powered live updates for every status change — no refreshing, no guessing.
⬡
State-Aware Opportunities
All 36 Nigerian states supported with precise location filtering and live slot availability signals.

Ready to connect students
with real opportunity?
